generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time environmental temperature data integrated via semantic annotations in BIM model, synchronized with digital twin through Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureData
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring real-time humidity levels deployed across building infrastructure, connected to digital twin via standardized Eclipse Hono ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalHumidityData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor detecting real-time occupancy patterns in building spaces, integrated with BIM model for spatial relationship mapping and real-time synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor monitoring real-time energy consumption metrics at component/zone level, ingested through Eclipse Hono for bidirectional digital twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionData
]

instance AdaptiveControlFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized IoT sensor providing feedback for adaptive control systems, integrated with BIM model to define functional relationships and real-time control policies"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControlFeedbackData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance ControlFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AdaptiveControlFeedbackSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically annotated BIM model enriched with device metadata (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) and control logic for runtime integration with physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuntimeArtifactsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated model-to-model and model-to-text transformations producing RESTful APIs, MQTT endpoints, and Ditto service definitions from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoMiddleware, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time telemetry streams (temperature, humidity, occupancy) ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed for visualization and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureData, EnvironmentalHumidityData, OccupancyData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies for adaptive systems (e.g., lighting optimization) integrated as runtime services within the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D representations in Unreal Engine 5 for interactive monitoring and simulation of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT connectivity middleware facilitating standardized data ingestion and real-time synchronization between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance EclipseDittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented middleware for telemetry management, event-driven updates, and service orchestration enabling bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE tools for automated extraction of semantics from BIM models and generation of runtime artifacts (APIs, service definitions)"
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform enabling interactive monitoring of building operations and real-time data representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive system optimization (e.g., energy consumption, visual comfort)"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time ingestion of sensor data through Eclipse Hono middleware with standardized protocols"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataVisualizationInsight, DataConsistencyAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service in Unreal Engine 5 providing immersive monitoring of building operations and real-time data representation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight, EnergyConsumptionVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating reinforcement learning for forecasting energy consumption, equipment failures, and occupancy trends"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight, FailurePredictionInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven service generating runtime interfaces for bidirectional communication between virtual and physical control systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyOptimizationAction, SystemCommissioningAction
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling real-time bidirectional communication between digital twin and physical actuators via Ditto middleware"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuatorControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of real-time sensor data streams in the digital twin interface"
]

instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of occupancy patterns across building spaces"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption visualization at component and zone levels"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output forecasting future energy consumption patterns"
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Equipment failure prediction based on real-time sensor data and machine learning models"
]

instance ControlPolicyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of control policies (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) for improved efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration and commissioning of building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of control commands to physical actuators based on digital twin processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataConsistencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated synchronization and validation of data between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control device implementing adaptive lighting policies configured via model-driven approach with BIM-enriched metadata"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system managing HVAC operations with real-time adjustments enabled through bidirectional Ditto communication"
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized controller implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting optimization policies"
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure containing all control systems, sensors, and actuators"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                LightingActuator, HVACController, AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment containing all digital representations, services, and processing components"
    base:contains EnrichedBIMModel, RuntimeArtifactsModel, SensorDataStream,
                ControlModel, VisualizationModel, EclipseHonoMiddleware,
                EclipseDittoMiddleware, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool, UnrealEngineVisualization,
                ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

// C5: Data Flow Connections
instance SensorDataFlow : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Standardized data flow connecting physical sensors to digital twin components through middleware"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureData, EnvironmentalHumidityData, OccupancyData,
                    EnergyConsumptionData, ControlFeedbackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance ControlDataFlow : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Bidirectional data flow enabling control commands from digital twin to physical actuators"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlFeedbackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance ModelIntegrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing the integration of BIM models with runtime configurations and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureData, OccupancyData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnrichedBIMModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves **control logic and commands generated by the DT**, which are sent back to the physical system via Ditto and Eclipse Hono. The framework supports **automated commissioning** and **runtime adjustments** (e.g., adaptive lighting policies, energy optimization) based on real-time analytics. The BIM model defines the **control semantics** (e.g., device configurations, tenant-specific rules), which are transformed into runtime artifacts (e.g., RESTful APIs or MQTT endpoints) for seamless interaction with physical actuators. This interaction is **real-time and bidirectional**, ensuring continuous synchronization between the virtual and physical systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates on **real-time intervals**, with data synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second granularity** to support adaptive control and predictive analytics. The framework ensures **low-latency communication** via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, enabling near-instantaneous updates between the physical and virtual domains. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization, ensuring the DT reflects the physical system’s state with minimal delay."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The foundational semantic model enriched with runtime configurations.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (connectivity) and Ditto (service orchestration) for real-time data exchange.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D monitoring.
   - **Control Layer**: Custom services (e.g., adaptive lighting, energy optimization) integrated via standardized APIs.
   - **Extension Points**: Pluggable modules for **custom analytics, predictive maintenance, or domain-specific services**.
   The constellation supports **bidirectional synchronization** between physical and virtual systems, ensuring **real-time alignment** and **scalable deployment** across infrastructure projects."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages of the building**, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During the **design phase**, the BIM model serves as the foundational representation, enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic). In the **construction phase**, the DT supports **automated commissioning** of physical systems. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control**. The framework also supports **post-occupancy evaluation**, where sensor data is used to refine control policies (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment between physical and virtual systems** by measuring synchronization accuracy and data consistency.
   - **Validation mechanisms**: **Model validation** (e.g., checking BIM semantics) and **runtime verification** (e.g., sensor data consistency checks).
   - **Uncertainty handling**: The framework accounts for **sensor noise, latency, and semantic drift** via **real-time data reconciliation** and **adaptive control policies**.
   - **Verification**: **Automated testing** of runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto service deployments) to ensure correctness before integration with physical systems."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for lightweight IoT connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for standardized data exchange protocols. Communication occurs via **RESTful APIs** and **MQTT endpoints**, enabling bidirectional telemetry between the physical and virtual domains. The middleware supports **JSON-based payloads** for interoperability with heterogeneous systems. Network protocols are optimized for **low-latency, high-reliability** synchronization, though specific transport layers (e.g., TCP/IP) are not explicitly mentioned."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed using a **scalable, artifact-driven approach** that leverages **model-driven engineering (MDE)** to generate deployable components. The framework supports **cloud or edge deployment** (though specific infrastructure details like Docker/Kubernetes are not mentioned), ensuring **low-overhead updates** and **modular scalability**. The **Unreal Engine** visualization layer may require **high-performance computing resources** for interactive 3D rendering. The deployment process is **automated**, reducing manual intervention and enabling **reproducible DT setups** across projects. The **standardized extension points** facilitate integration with existing IT infrastructure (e.g., facility management systems)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized Extension Points**: Enable seamless connection to **third-party analytics, IoT platforms, or external DTs**.
   - **Interoperability with AECO Standards**: Aligns with **BIM and MDE** for cross-disciplinary collaboration.
   - **Modular Service Architecture**: Facilitates integration with **custom plugins** or **domain-specific tools** (e.g., energy management systems).
   The framework does not explicitly mention **IFC, REST, or MQTT** as mandatory standards but emphasizes **plug-and-play compatibility** for heterogeneous systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM (Building Information Modeling)**: Semantic foundation for geometric, spatial, and functional data.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Framework for automated model-to-model and model-to-text transformations.
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**: Standardized middleware for IoT connectivity and data exchange.
   The framework does not explicitly reference **IFC, OMA LWM2M, or IoT connectivity protocols** as mandatory standards, though it aligns with **AECO-specific interoperability requirements**."
]
